name: SiteForge
tagline: Launch professional websites without writing a single line of code
metaDescription: SiteForge replaces Wix with a drag-and-drop website builder, responsive templates, custom domains, and built-in SEO tools — all included in your AppBuster subscription.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><text x="50" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-size="60">💻</text></svg>

features.title: Visual Page Builder
features.desc: Build pages by dragging sections, images, and text blocks onto a live canvas. What you see is exactly what visitors get — no preview mode needed.

features.title: Custom Domain Connection
features.desc: Connect your own domain name or register a new one directly from the dashboard. SSL certificates are provisioned automatically at no extra cost.

features.title: Responsive Design
features.desc: Every template adapts to mobile, tablet, and desktop screen sizes automatically. Fine-tune breakpoints with per-device layout controls when you need precision.

features.title: Built-In SEO Tools
features.desc: Edit meta titles, descriptions, and Open Graph tags for every page. The SEO audit tool flags missing alt text, broken links, and slow-loading images before you publish.

features.title: Blog Engine
features.desc: Publish blog posts with categories, tags, and scheduled publishing. The built-in RSS feed and sitemap keep search engines and subscribers up to date.

features.title: One-Click Publishing
features.desc: Push changes live instantly or schedule updates for a future date. Rollback to any previous version with a single click if something goes wrong.
